prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.3 kg; Height 159.8 cm; BMI 19.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.0%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 320mg/dL; 9 months ago 303mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 248mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.1kg; 9 months ago 48.7kg; 6 months ago 52.2kg; 3 months ago 51.3kg; current 50.3kg), Height (12 months ago 159.8cm; 9 months ago 159.8cm; 6 months ago 159.8cm; 3 months ago 159.8cm; current 159.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 19.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 196mg/g; 9 months ago 219mg/g; 6 months ago 163mg/g; 3 months ago 180mg/g; current 252mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 87mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 155mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.87 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
